thing-type.label: Rachio Sprinkler Zone
thing-type.description: A zone of a Rachio Sprinkler Controller

parameter.name: zoneId
parameter.label: Zone ID
parameter.description: Rachio API zone UUID. Required for manually created zone Things.

channel-type.label: Name
channel-type.description: Name of the zone as configured in the Rachio App.

channel-type.label: Zone Number
channel-type.description: Zone Number (1-16)

channel-type.label: Enabled
channel-type.description: ON: Zone is enabled, OFF: Zone is disabled. Sending ON/OFF enables or disables the zone.

channel-type.label: Run Zone
channel-type.description: ON: start watering, OFF: stop watering

channel-type.label: Runtime
channel-type.description: Set > 0 to start the zone for the given number of seconds.

channel-type.label: Available Water
channel-type.description: Available water for the zone.

channel-type.label: Total Runtime
channel-type.description: Total runtime of the zone.

channel-type.label: Image URL
channel-type.description: URL for the zone picture/image.

channel-type.label: Image
channel-type.description: Zone picture as native openHAB image data.

channel-type.label: Depth of Water
channel-type.description: Depth of water value returned by Rachio for this zone.

channel-type.label: Saturated Depth of Water
channel-type.description: Saturated depth of water value returned by Rachio for this zone.

channel-type.label: Management Allowed Depletion
channel-type.description: Management allowed depletion value returned by Rachio for this zone.

channel-type.label: Root Zone Depth
channel-type.description: Root zone depth value returned by Rachio for this zone.

channel-type.label: Efficiency
channel-type.description: Efficiency value returned by Rachio for this zone.

channel-type.label: Yard Area
channel-type.description: Yard area in square feet as returned by Rachio for this zone.

channel-type.label: Last Watered Date
channel-type.description: Timestamp when this zone was last watered.

channel-type.label: Fixed Runtime
channel-type.description: Fixed runtime value returned by Rachio for this zone.

channel-type.label: Maximum Runtime
channel-type.description: Maximum runtime value returned by Rachio for this zone.

channel-type.label: Runtime Without Multiplier
channel-type.description: Runtime without multiplier value returned by Rachio for this zone.

channel-type.label: Schedule Data Modified
channel-type.description: ON when Rachio reports modified schedule data for this zone.

channel-type.label: Moisture Level
channel-type.description: Command-only soil moisture adjustment input for zone/setMoistureLevel, in millimeters. Rachio does not return this value as readable zone state, so it may be UNDEF until a command is sent.

channel-type.label: Moisture Percent
channel-type.description: Command-only soil moisture adjustment input for zone/setMoisturePercent. Valid range is 0 to 1. Rachio does not return this value as readable zone state, so it may be UNDEF until a command is sent.
